[BODY]
21 priority creators, 50 search queries, 22 GitHub repos, 7 RSS feeds. x_engine pulls 375 tweets a day at zero dollars per run via codex CLI. Most "AI content engines" I have tested charge fifty dollars a month for half that surface area and still ship slop drafts.
